# Hive Hangouts — LLM Integration Reference

This document is a compact, accurate reference for AI assistants and code generators
integrating with the Hive Hangouts SDK. Read this before writing any integration code.

---

## What is Hive Hangouts?

Twitter Spaces-style live audio rooms for the Hive blockchain. Users authenticate with
their Hive identity (no separate accounts). The product is sometimes called "OpenPods"
on Hive frontends like snapie.io and 3speak.tv.

Three deployable components:
1. **LiveKit SFU** — self-hosted WebRTC server (audio/video routing, recording, streaming)
2. **Fastify API** (`server/`) — auth gateway; verifies Hive signatures, issues LiveKit tokens
3. **React SDK** (`packages/`) — embeddable npm library for React web apps

---

## npm packages

| Package | Install | Use for |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@snapie/hangouts-react` | `npm i @snapie/hangouts-react @livekit/components-react livekit-client` | React web apps — includes all components, hooks, and re-exports core |
| `@snapie/hangouts-core` | `npm i @snapie/hangouts-core` | React Native, Vue/Svelte, server scripts |

Import CSS: `import '@snapie/hangouts-react/src/styles/hangouts.css'`

---

## Minimal React integration

```tsx
import { HangoutsProvider, RoomLobby, HangoutsRoom } from '@snapie/hangouts-react';
import '@snapie/hangouts-react/src/styles/hangouts.css';
import { useState } from 'react';

export function App() {
  const [room, setRoom] = useState<string | null>(null);
  return (
    <HangoutsProvider apiBaseUrl="https://your-api.example.com">
      {room
        ? <HangoutsRoom roomName={room} onLeave={() => setRoom(null)} embedded />
        : <RoomLobby onJoinRoom={setRoom} />
      }
    </HangoutsProvider>
  );
}
```

---

## HangoutsProvider props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Notes |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------|
| `apiBaseUrl` | string | Yes | — | Base URL of the Fastify server (no trailing slash) |
| `livekitServerUrl` | string | No | `wss://livekit.3speak.tv` | LiveKit WebSocket URL |
| `sessionToken` | string | No | — | Pre-existing JWT; skips login flow |
| `username` | string | No | — | Paired with `sessionToken` |
| `imageServerApiKey` | string | No | — | Bearer token for `images.3speak.tv`; enables room background picker |
| `aioha` | AiohaLike | No | — | Routes auth + boost transfers through any Aioha provider or custodial adapter |

---

## Authentication

### Option A — Hive Keychain (browser extension only)

```ts
import { loginWithKeychain } from '@snapie/hangouts-core';
const session = await loginWithKeychain(apiClient, 'alice');
// { token: string, username: string }
```

Or in React via `useHangoutsAuth()`:
```ts
const { login } = useHangoutsAuth();
await login('alice');  // opens Keychain popup
```

### Option B — Aioha (recommended for production)

Pass your Aioha instance to `<HangoutsProvider aioha={aioha}>`.
`useHangoutsAuth().login()` will use `aioha.signMessage()` automatically.
Boost transfers use `aioha.transfer()`.
Supported providers: Keychain, HiveAuth, PeakVault, MetaMask Snap, Ledger.

```ts
import { loginWithAioha } from '@snapie/hangouts-core';
// aioha must already have an active session (user logged in via Aioha's own flow)
const session = await loginWithAioha(apiClient, aioha);
```

### Option C — Custodial (Google login / server-held keys)

Implement the `AiohaLike` interface and pass it as `aioha`:

```ts
import type { AiohaLike } from '@snapie/hangouts-core';

const custodialAdapter: AiohaLike = {
  getCurrentUser: () => username,
  isLoggedIn: () => true,

  // Called during login — sign the server's challenge with the posting key
  signMessage: async (message) => {
    const res = await fetch('/api/custodial/sign', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ username, message }),
    });
    const { signature } = await res.json();
    return { success: true, result: signature };
  },

  // Called when the user sends a boost — optional if app has no boosts
  transfer: async (to, amount, currency, memo) => {
    const res = await fetch('/api/custodial/transfer', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ from: username, to, amount, currency, memo }),
    });
    return res.ok ? { success: true } : { success: false, error: await res.text() };
  },
};

// <HangoutsProvider aioha={custodialAdapter} ...>
```

### Option D — Custom sign function

```ts
import { loginWithSignFn } from '@snapie/hangouts-core';
const session = await loginWithSignFn(apiClient, 'alice', async (message) => {
  return mySigningBackend.sign(message);  // return hex signature string
});
```

### Auth flow (all paths)

1. `POST /auth/challenge` → `{ challenge, expires }`
2. Sign `challenge` with the user's Hive posting key
3. `POST /auth/verify` → `{ token, username }` — this JWT goes on all subsequent requests as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

---

## useHangoutsAuth() hook

```ts
const {
  username,           // string | null
  isAuthenticated,    // boolean
  canSignIn,          // true if aioha present OR Keychain installed
  isAiohaAvailable,   // true when aioha prop was passed to HangoutsProvider
  isKeychainAvailable,// true when window.hive_keychain exists
  login,              // (username?: string) => Promise<void>
  logout,             // () => void
  isLoading,          // boolean
  error,              // string | null
} = useHangoutsAuth();
```

---

## HangoutsRoom props

```tsx
<HangoutsRoom
  roomName="alice-room-abc123"        // required
  onLeave={() => {}}                  // called when user clicks Leave
  onError={(err: Error) => {}}        // WebRTC error (show fallback UI)
  embedded                            // removes min-height; fits in modals/panels
  maxHeight="80vh"
  video                               // enable camera + screen share (premium users)
  guestFallback                       // unauthenticated viewers auto-join as listen-only
  getShareUrl={(roomName, origin) =>  // build share URL; omit to hide the share button
    `https://yourapp.com/rooms/${roomName}`
  }
  onAudioHandoff={(file) => {         // { blob, filename, duration (s), size (bytes) }
    // upload to podcast/3speak/IPFS; omit to hide the audio Upload button
  }}
  onVideoHandoff={(file) => {         // same shape
    // upload to video platform; omit to hide the video Upload button
  }}
/>
```

---

## RoomLobby props

```tsx
<RoomLobby
  onJoinRoom={(roomName: string) => {}}
  onRoomCreated={(room: Room, opts: { notifyOnHive: boolean }) => {}}
  allowGuestBrowse   // show room list + join-as-guest to unauthenticated users
/>
```

---

## React hooks reference

| Hook | Returns |
|------|---------|
| `useHangoutsAuth()` | `{ login, logout, username, isAuthenticated, canSignIn, isAiohaAvailable, isLoading, error }` |
| `useHangoutsRoom()` | `{ join, create, listen, leave, isGuest, roomMeta, transferHost, setLayout, setViewState }` |
| `useLiveHost(fallback?)` | `{ host: string, isLocalHost: boolean }` — updates live when host transfers |
| `useRoomList()` | `Room[]` — polls every 10s; server filters unlisted rooms |
| `useChat()` | `{ messages, sendMessage }` |
| `useBoosts()` | `{ boosts: BoostEvent[] }` — subscribes to `boost` LiveKit data topic |
| `useHandRaise()` | `{ raised, toggle, raisedParticipants }` |
| `useHostControls()` | `{ promote, demote, kick, ban }` |
| `useRecording()` | `{ start, stop, status, isRecording, fetchFile }` |
| `useHiveAvatar(username)` | `string \| null` — Hive profile picture URL |

---

## Server API endpoints

All endpoints on the Fastify server. "Host" auth = Bearer JWT + must be the room host.

### Auth
| Method | Path | Auth | Body | Returns |
|--------|------|------|------|---------|
| POST | `/auth/challenge` | No | `{ username }` | `{ challenge, expires }` |
| POST | `/auth/verify` | No | `{ username, challenge, signature }` | `{ token, username }` |

### Rooms
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|--------|------|------|-------|
| GET | `/rooms` | No | Lists all non-unlisted rooms |
| GET | `/rooms/:name` | No | Single room |
| POST | `/rooms` | Bearer | Body: `{ title, description?, backgroundImage?, visibility?, language?, boost? }` |
| POST | `/rooms/:name/join` | Bearer | Returns `JoinRoomResponse` |
| POST | `/rooms/:name/listen` | No | Guest token. Rate-limited: 10/5min per IP. Rejected for `hive-internal` rooms. Body: `{ displayName? }` or `{ silent: true }` for OBS observer |
| POST | `/rooms/:name/host` | Host | Body: `{ newHost }` — live host transfer |
| PATCH | `/rooms/:name/layout` | Host | Body: `{ layout: 'speaker'\|'grid'\|'single' }` |
| DELETE | `/rooms/:name` | Host | Ends the room |

### Participants
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|--------|------|------|-------|
| PATCH | `/rooms/:name/participants/:id/permissions` | Host | Body: `{ canPublish: boolean }` — promote/demote |
| DELETE | `/rooms/:name/participants/:id` | Host | Kick |
| POST | `/rooms/:name/participants/:id/ban` | Host | Ban guest (IP-scoped, guest-* only) |

### Recording
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|--------|------|------|-------|
| POST | `/rooms/:name/record/start` | Host | Body: `{ mode?: 'audio'\|'video', layout?: 'speaker'\|'grid'\|'single' }` |
| POST | `/rooms/:name/record/stop` | Host | Returns `{ downloadToken }` |
| GET | `/rooms/:name/record/file/:token` | Host | Streams the file; use `fetchRecordingFile()` SDK method |
| GET | `/rooms/:name/record/status` | Host | `{ recording, egressId?, mode?, layout? }` |
| PATCH | `/rooms/:name/record/layout` | Host | Switch layout mid-recording (video only) |

### Streaming
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|--------|------|------|-------|
| POST | `/rooms/:name/stream/start` | Host | Body: `{ platform: 'youtube'\|'twitch', streamKey, backgroundImageUrl?, videoEnabled? }` |
| POST | `/rooms/:name/stream/stop` | Host | |
| GET | `/rooms/:name/stream/status` | Host | `{ streaming, egressId }` |

### Boosts
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|--------|------|------|-------|
| GET | `/boosts/config` | No | `{ enabled, platformAccount, feePercent }` |
| PATCH | `/rooms/:name/boost` | Host | Update room boost config |

---

## Key TypeScript types

```ts
type RoomVisibility = 'public' | 'hive-internal' | 'unlisted'
// public    — listed, guests allowed
// hive-internal — listed, Hive accounts only (no guest tokens)
// unlisted  — hidden from lobby, link-only, guests allowed

interface Room {
  name: string; title: string; host: string
  description?: string; backgroundImage?: string
  numParticipants?: number; createdAt: string
  origin?: string        // hostname that created the room ("3speak.tv", "snapie.io")
  visibility?: RoomVisibility; language?: string; boost?: BoostConfig
}

interface BoostConfig {
  enabled: boolean; minBoostUsd: number; creatorPayoutAccount?: string
}

interface JoinRoomResponse {
  token: string; roomName: string; identity: string
  isHost: boolean; isPremium?: boolean; isGuest?: boolean
}

interface AuthSession { token: string; username: string }

interface RecordingFileResult {
  blob: Blob; filename: string; duration: number; size: number
}

interface BoostEvent {
  type: 'boost'; id: string; room: string; sender: string
  displayName?: string; message: string
  amount: string; asset: 'HIVE' | 'HBD'; usdAmount: number
  feeAmount: string; payoutAmount: string; recipient: string
  txId: string; blockNum: number; timestamp: number
  belowMinimum?: boolean   // below host's minBoostUsd; overlay suppressed, shown in history
}

class HangoutsApiError extends Error {
  status: number    // HTTP status code
  body?: unknown    // raw server response
}
```

---

## Identity prefixes

| Prefix | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `alice` (plain username) | Authenticated Hive account |
| `guest-{random}` | Unauthenticated guest — listen-only, cannot be promoted, can be IP-banned |
| `obs-{random}` | OBS overlay observer — invisible in participant lists, no cap/ban logic |

---

## Guest listener constraints

- Rate-limited: **10 tokens / 5 minutes per IP**
- Per-room guest cap enforced server-side (default 50)
- Cannot chat, raise hand, or be promoted to speaker
- Chat panel shows a "sign in to chat" prompt
- `hive-internal` rooms reject guest tokens entirely
- Guest token TTL: **2 hours**

---

## Boost system

Boosts are on-chain HIVE/HBD transfers to the platform account with a JSON memo.
The server watches the Hive stream, validates transfers, splits the payout, and
broadcasts a `BoostEvent` to all room participants via the `boost` LiveKit data topic.

### Memo format

```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "room": "alice-room-abc123",
  "message": "Great show!",
  "sender": "bob",
  "nonce": "1717000000000-abc123",
  "displayName": "Bob"
}
```

`version`, `room`, `message`, `sender`, `nonce` are required.

### How the transfer happens

1. Client calls `aioha.transfer(platformAccount, amount, currency, memo)` — or the built-in `SendBoostDialog` handles this automatically.
2. Server detects the on-chain transfer, validates the memo, deduplicates by `nonce`.
3. Server sends payout (minus platform fee) to `creatorPayoutAccount`.
4. Server broadcasts `BoostEvent` to the room's LiveKit data channel.
5. All participants receive it via `useBoosts()` and the overlay fires.

---

## Room visibility and `origin`

- `Room.origin` is set from the `Origin` header of the create request.
- Use it in `getShareUrl` to build share links that return the recipient to the same app:

```tsx
getShareUrl={(roomName, origin) => {
  if (origin === 'snapie.io') return `https://snapie.io/rooms/${roomName}`;
  if (origin === '3speak.tv') return `https://3speak.tv/openpods/${roomName}`;
  return `https://hangout.3speak.tv/room/${roomName}`;
}}
```

---

## Recording handoff pattern

The SDK never uploads for you. On stop, a 3-button dialog appears (Upload / Download / Dismiss).
Upload calls the handoff callback you supply:

```tsx
onAudioHandoff={(file) => {
  // file: { blob: Blob, filename: string, duration: number, size: number }
  const form = new FormData();
  form.append('file', file.blob, file.filename);
  await fetch('https://audio.3speak.tv/upload', { method: 'POST', body: form });
}}
```

Omit the callback to hide the Upload button for that mode.

---

## Theming

CSS custom properties. Set on a wrapper element:

```css
[data-hh-theme="dark"] {
  --hh-bg: #1a1a2e;
  --hh-text: #e2e2e2;
  --hh-primary: #6c63ff;
  --hh-surface: #16213e;
  --hh-border: #2a2a4a;
}
```

Auto-detects system preference. Override with `data-hh-theme="dark"` or `data-hh-theme="light"`.

---

## Common gotchas

1. **`livekitServerUrl` must be `wss://`** — not `https://`.
2. **`apiBaseUrl` must be `https://`** — not `wss://`.
3. **`aioha` user must already be logged in** before calling `loginWithAioha`. Drive Aioha's own login UI first.
4. **Guest identity = `guest-{random}`** — the `identity` field in `JoinRoomResponse` tells you the actual stamped identity.
5. **New speakers start mic/camera OFF** — don't assume they're live immediately after promotion.
6. **`getShareUrl` receives `origin`** (the hostname string, e.g. `"3speak.tv"`), not a full URL.
7. **Boosts below `minBoostUsd` are NOT rejected** — they arrive with `belowMinimum: true`. Overlay is suppressed; they appear in history with a badge.
8. **`unlisted` rooms are filtered from `GET /rooms`** — you must know the name to link to one.
9. **`hive-internal` rooms reject `/listen` requests** — check `room.visibility` before showing a guest join button.
10. **`HangoutsApiError.status === 429`** on the guest token endpoint means IP rate-limited — show a wait message.
